description: Progression systems, daily challenges, achievements, save/load, and unlockable themes. This adds the meta-game layer with persistence, daily challenge seeds/streaks, XP/levels, achievement tracking, and card back theme unlocks.
steps: Create src/config/themes.js - define 8+ card back themes: Classic Green (default/free), Royal Blue (free), Crimson (level 3), Gold Pattern (level 5), Night Sky (level 8), Ocean Wave (level 10), Abstract Art (win 10 games), Daily Champion (7-day streak). Each theme defined as draw instructions (colors, patterns, gradients) for programmatic canvas rendering.

Create src/config/achievements.js - achievement definitions: First Win, Speed Demon (win under 3 min), Streak Master (7-day streak), Perfect Game (no undos), Century (100 games played), Foundation Builder (50 wins), Daily Devotee (30 daily challenges), Card Shark (win 5 in a row), Minimalist (win with fewest moves), Hard Mode Hero (win on Hard)
Create src/config/daily-seeds.js - daily seed generation: deterministic seed from date (YYYY-MM-DD string hashed to number), produces same shuffle for all players on same day

Create src/systems/progression.js - XP system: earn XP per game (base + bonus for win/speed/no-undo), level thresholds (exponential curve), level-up notification, currency (coins) earned per level, track total XP and current level

Create src/systems/daily-challenge.js - daily challenge system: generate today's game from daily seed, track completion, streak counting (consecutive days played and won), streak display, streak bonus XP, streak-break notification

Create src/systems/achievements.js - achievement tracker: check conditions after each game, unlock achievements, show unlock notification (toast popup with icon and name), track progress toward each achievement

Create src/systems/save-manager.js - save/load system: save game state (current game in progress, all cards positions/states), save meta state (statistics, achievements, unlocks, progression, settings, daily streak). Use platform adapter for storage (localStorage fallback). Auto-save on every move. Load on startup.
Wire themes into card.js rendering - card back draws the selected theme pattern
Wire progression into game completion - award XP, check level-ups, check achievements after each game
Wire daily challenge into screens.js - daily challenge button shows today's challenge, streak display, completion status
Add statistics tracking - games played, games won, win percentage, best time, average time, longest win streak, total moves, favorite mode
acceptance_criteria: Save/load persists game state across page refreshes (localStorage)
Daily challenge produces same game for same date, different game for different date
Streak tracks consecutive daily challenge completions correctly
XP awards after game completion, level-up triggers at thresholds
Achievements unlock when conditions met and show notification
Card back themes render correctly, unlocked themes selectable in settings
All meta-game state persists via save-manager
verification: node tests/selftest.mjs passes daily seed determinism tests, progression math tests, achievement condition tests
Manual verification: complete a game, verify save persists, check XP awarded, verify daily challenge seed consistency
findings: All tests pass (185 selftest + 89 domtest = 274 assertions). Build succeeds. Key implementation notes: (1) Themes use isThemeUnlocked() with state object for dynamic unlock checking rather than static unlocked boolean. (2) Card class uses module-level _activeTheme variable set via setCardTheme() export. (3) SaveManager uses SAVE_KEYS constants for consistent key management. (4) DailyChallenge uses YYYY-MM-DD date keys for streak tracking. (5) Progression exposes calculateGameXp() as named export for use by main.js. (6) Main menu now has Daily Challenge button. (7) Stats object expanded with many new fields (averageTime, totalMoves, hardModeWins, perfectWins, etc).
